en: Freddy? Can you go a bit higher?
If I go any higher, only dogs will hear me. Try.
Freddy's note, sorry. Go on, roll the tape.
Overdub 24 of French. LIGHTNING! VERY VERY LIGHTNING ME!
Jesus, how many more Galileos do you want? Freddy wants to do a few more overdubs.
ko: 제발, 갈릴레오 몇 개 더 필요해?

en: Do we even have any tape left? I do have to say, the tape is wearing out.
ko: 테이프가 닳아가고 있어. 더는 못 버텨.

en: It can't take much more. Yeah, we can't afford much more.
We're already three weeks over schedule? Er, dub 26 of Fred's thing.
LIGHTNING! VERY VERY LIGHTNING ME! One more, one more.
Again. Go on, roll the track.
My nuts feel like they're in my chest right now. Are we done?
ko: 지금 내 고환이 가슴에 있는 것 같아.
